productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Tween Analg Black Watch

Team this with semi-casual outfits for unparalleled cool.Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: RoundSteel case holding onto a fixed bezel in a ship& rsquo s wheel style for added durability, style and comfort Plastic strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with a 2-D touch, with dull blue markingsArrows radiating out of the centre towards the four markings of 3, 6, 9 and 12 o& rsquo clock that are represented by the four directions, and lines radiating to the remaining hour markingsDate marking socket at the 4 o& rsquo clock positionQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset time and dateSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters, which helps you wear it when swimming
